summary: Show Recycled Action Plan Template Items
description: Returns a Specific Recycled Action Plan Template Item for a given company

items.description: Company Action Plan Template Item Assignee (Compact)

created_at.description: Time the Company Action Plan Template Item Assignee was created

is_holding.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the assignee is necessary to sign for a hold point

role.description: Role of the Company Action Plan Template Item Assignee

updated_at.description: Time the Company Action Plan Template Item Assignee was updated

created_at.description: Time the Recycled Action Plan Template Item was created

deleted_at.description: Time the Recycled Action Plan Template Item was deleted

description.description: Description of the Recycled Action Plan Template Item

holding_type.description: Recycled Action Plan Template Item holding type specifies whether the current item holds all the succeeding items in the section or the plan

plan_template_id.description: Action Plan Template ID the Recycled Action Plan Template Item belongs to

position.description: Postion of the Recycled Action Plan Template Item

plan_template_section_id.description: Action Plan Template Section ID the Recycled Action Plan Template Item belongs to

title.description: Title of the Recycled Action Plan Template Item

due_at.description: Due date for the recycled template item

updated_at.description: Time the Recycled Action Plan Template Item was updated
